title: Uri Geller’s meeting with Werner Von Braun!
summary: Uri Geller recounts a personal meeting with Werner Von Braun, during which Von Braun showed him pieces of metal from his personal safe, claiming one was debris from a crashed UFO. The encounter deeply impacted Geller given Von Braun's prominent role in the space program.

key_claims.claim: Werner Von Braun showed Uri Geller a piece of metal from his personal safe and stated it was a piece of a UFO that crashed on Earth
Uri Geller sensed that the metal pieces shown to him by Von Braun did not feel like they were from Earth
